notes:
## New Features
- **Image Attachment via Drag & Drop**: Drag and drop images directly into the AI Chat area
- **Image Attachment via Paste**: Press Ctrl+V to paste images from clipboard in AI Chat
- **Visual Feedback**: Green overlay appears when dragging images over the chat

## Bug Fixes
- **Image Data URL Prefix Strip**: Fixed a critical bug where image snippets weren't pasting because `inject_image()` tried to base64-decode the full data URL string (`data:image/png;base64,...`) instead of just the base64 portion. Images now paste correctly in Telegram, WhatsApp, and other apps.
- **Snippet Editor Image Preview**: Fixed image preview not showing when editing existing image snippets
- **OmniSearch Embedding Accuracy**: Increased embed token limit from 1024 to 4096, improved token estimation for multilingual text, added proper error logging for embedding failures, and added query truncation before embedding

## Previous
- v0.2.7: Database migration fix for existing users
- v0.2.6: Image snippet support (Text/Image/Both content types)
